markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Expedite content publishing and align on the upcoming content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**"Semantic AI" Article Needs Revision:** The article must be revised to broaden its scope beyond semantic models. This is critical to counter competitor positioning (Looker, Omni) and avoid alienating prospects who lack a "gold standard" semantic layer.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [**Publishing Blockage Easing:** A new SEO/content hire starts March 9, which will help clear the 19-article review backlog. Peter is also accelerating his personal review pace.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Next 5 Articles Prioritized:** The next five articles are "Bolt-on vs. Built-in," "Data Collaboration," "AI Data Literacy," "Natural Language Query," and "AI Analytics Platform."](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**New Content Focus:** Future content will center on "context curation," a key Hex differentiator. GrowthX will research related keywords (rules files, skills) for new topics.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)

## Topics

### Publishing Blockage & Resolution

  - [**Problem:** Only 18 articles published, with a 19-article backlog in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [**Cause:** Internal review capacity was limited.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [**New Hire:** A new SEO/content manager starts March 9 to streamline workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Accelerated Reviews:** Peter is personally reviewing 5–6 articles daily.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Article-Specific Feedback

  - [**"Semantic AI" Article**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**Problem:** The article's narrow focus on semantic models misaligns with Hex's positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This focus risks alienating prospects who lack a "gold standard" semantic layer and plays into the positioning of competitors (Looker, Omni) who *require* a semantic model.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
      - [**Required Revision:** Broaden the scope to include lightweight context methods (e.g., endorsing tables, adding rules/guides). This shows prospects can start immediately and build toward more sophisticated models over time.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [**"Data Analysis Techniques" Article**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
      - [**Revision:** Adjust phrasing to emphasize that while the agent is powerful, human oversight is still required to ensure the right questions are being asked and the analysis is valid.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**"Tableau Comparison" Article**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Status:** Awaiting review from the Hex product marketer.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Significance:** Comparison pieces are top performers, making this a high-priority article.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)

### Upcoming Content Roadmap

  - [**Next 5 Articles (Prioritized):**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
    1.  [Bolt-on vs. Built-in](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
    2.  [Data Collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
    3.  [AI Data Literacy](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
    4.  [Natural Language Query](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
    5.  [AI Analytics Platform (Peter will share an internal resource to inform this)](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [**"Data Drift" Article:**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
      - [**Angle:** Explore how AI makes data drift more visible and how bad context can cause AI agents to "fail faster."](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
  - [**Future Focus: "Context Curation"**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is a core Hex differentiator.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX will research related keywords (rules files, skills) for new topic ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Revise the "Semantic AI" article to broaden its scope; move it to "Drafts for Review" in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Apply minor revisions to the "Data Analysis Techniques" article.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [Research keywords for "context curation" and related topics.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
      - [Schedule an extended sync for next week (Week 16) to review the partnership and offsite takeaways.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [**Peter:**](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [Share the internal resource defining an "AI Analytics Platform" to inform the new article.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [Review the "Tableau Comparison" article with the product marketer.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [Publish the three revised articles once they are restaged.](https://fathom.video/share/RXfhiBCSzLUz-zuoz5MqVpxWPs-NYdQp?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
